note: Lead-consolidated defect register. Teammates report defects in their own qa-audit/<name>.md; the lead merges confirmed entries here. Severity: Critical|High|Medium|Low. Confidence: Confirmed|Suspected. No secrets/PII.

defects.summary: ruff F401 unused imports
defects.detail: app/api_magic_link.py: datetime.datetime + app.auth.routes.SESSION_COOKIE unused; app/auth/tokens.py: sqlmodel.select unused.
defects.fix_summary: remove unused imports; ruff check app -> 0 errors

defects.summary: Privilege escalation: admin role could promote any user to owner and suspend owners
defects.root_cause: api_admin role/suspend handlers lacked owner-tier guards
defects.fix_summary: Promoting to owner / changing an owner's role / suspending an owner now require caller role=owner; _require_admin returns (id,role).

defects.summary: Broken object-level authz: any authed user could revoke another org's API key
defects.root_cause: revoke handler did not verify key belongs to caller's org
defects.fix_summary: cross-check key_id against list_for_org(org_id) before revoke

defects.summary: Password-reset email linked to API host (public_base_url) → raw JSON page on FC
defects.fix_summary: link to frontend_base_url/auth/reset/confirm

defects.summary: Dashboard buttons silently no-op (Upgrade, Delete workspace, Invite, webhooks, settings)
defects.fix_summary: Upgrade→POST /api/billing/checkout (or honest toast); Delete→POST /api/me/delete w/ confirm; non-functional controls disabled+labelled

defects.summary: Homepage hero blank on first paint (content hidden during animation delay)
defects.root_cause: .vl-rise used animation-fill-mode: both, hiding hero content for 90-270ms delay; on slow paint it looked blank
defects.fix_summary: changed fill-mode to forwards so natural (visible) state shows before animation; reduced-motion override extended to .vl-fade-up

defects.summary: Contact form POSTed to nonexistent /api/contact → 404
defects.root_cause: placeholder form action with no backend route
defects.fix_summary: switched to mailto: fallback so the form does something real

defects.summary: No OpenGraph/Twitter card metadata; thin SEO descriptions on 6 routes; 404 title double-suffix
defects.fix_summary: added openGraph+twitter to root layout; per-route descriptions; fixed 404 title

defects.summary: ThemeToggle aria-label wrong pre-hydration; mobile nav missing aria-controls/id; logo link missing aria-label
defects.fix_summary: fixed aria-label timing, added aria-controls+id+aria-hidden, logo aria-label 'ClaimFarm home'

defects.summary: turbopack.root inferred-workspace warning (multiple lockfiles)
defects.root_cause: web/next.config.ts lacks turbopack.root; ~/package-lock.json + repo lockfiles confuse inference
defects.fix_summary: set turbopack.root = path.resolve(__dirname) in web/next.config.ts

defects.summary: Twilio webhook had no signature validation (forgeable intake)
defects.fix_summary: _verify_twilio_signature() HMAC-SHA1; 403 on fail; skipped only when TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN unset (dev)

defects.summary: Telegram webhook had no secret-token validation
defects.fix_summary: _verify_telegram_secret() against X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token; 403 on fail; needs TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET set + passed to setWebhook (UAR)

defects.summary: Bird webhook had no HMAC validation
defects.fix_summary: _verify_bird_signature() HMAC-SHA256; 403 on fail; skipped when BIRD_WEBHOOK_SECRET unset

defects.summary: CORS preview-deploy regex too broad — attacker subdomain claimfarm-dashboard-evil.vercel.app matched
defects.fix_summary: tightened regex to require Vercel hex-hash pattern; narrowed allow_methods to GET/POST/OPTIONS/HEAD

defects.summary: server header disclosure; missing HSTS; overly broad CORS methods
defects.fix_summary: strip Server header; add Strict-Transport-Security; narrow methods

defects.summary: CI ruff/pytest steps used '|| true' (non-blocking) — green builds hid failures
defects.fix_summary: removed '|| true'; lint+tests now gate the build

defects.summary: AUTH_DEV_LINKS defaults true → prod returns live reset/verify/magic tokens in JSON. POST /auth/reset with a victim's registered email returns a working password-reset link = account takeover.
defects.root_cause: auth_dev_links default True + dev-link disclosure active in prod (FC doesn't set AUTH_DEV_LINKS=false; no email transport configured)
defects.fix_summary: LEAD: flipped auth_dev_links default to False in app/config.py (secure-by-default; prod no longer discloses tokens). Local dev opts in via AUTH_DEV_LINKS=true in .env (gitignored). Restoring prod web email convenience requires RESEND_API_KEY (UAR-1/UAR-8).
defects.regression_test: tests/test_sec007_dev_links.py (3 tests: signup/reset/magic omit *_url when off)

defects.summary: Approve wrote status=approved before insurer.submit(); on insurer error claim stuck permanently approved
defects.fix_summary: preflight write set to 'submitted'; rollback to pending_review on exception

defects.summary: _notify_farmer read claim.pdf_path which doesn't exist on Claim model → PDF never sent
defects.fix_summary: pass explicit pdf_path from ClaimRow to _notify_farmer

defects.summary: perceptual_hash client existed but was never called; duplicate photos created duplicate claims
defects.fix_summary: dedupe block added before Qwen-VL in process_inbound_telegram; duplicate→notify; failure never blocks

defects.summary: loadQueue useCallback included selectedId → re-fetch on every claim click
defects.fix_summary: removed selectedId from deps; functional setter

defects.summary: 401 in console showed toast but did not redirect to sign-in
defects.fix_summary: added handle401 → router.replace on unauthorized (path corrected by VER-001)

defects.summary: CLAIM-005 redirected to /auth/login which is a 404 (route is /auth/sign-in) — would bounce a 401'd adjuster to a dead page
defects.root_cause: wrong path string in handle401 introduced by CLAIM-005 fix
defects.fix_summary: LEAD corrected to /auth/sign-in?next=/admin (matches app-shell gate convention)

defects.summary: Unused Twilio/Bird webhooks skipped signature validation when their secret was unset → open, unauthenticated public intake surface (this deployment uses Telegram only, so those secrets will never be set).
defects.root_cause: skip-when-unconfigured default left unused channels open to unsigned posts that ran the full claim pipeline
defects.fix_summary: LEAD: _verify_twilio_signature / _verify_bird_signature now REJECT (403) when their secret is unset, closing the unused endpoints. Telegram intentionally keeps skip-until-secret so the live bot isn't broken before TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET is set.
